net.milkbowl.vault2.economy

Interface AsyncEconomy

    AsyncEconomy
    Since:
    2.20
    Author:

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> accountSupportsCurrency(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String currency)
      Asynchronously checks if the given account supports the specified currency within the context of the provided plugin.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> accountSupportsCurrency(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull String world)
      Asynchronously checks if a specific account supports the provided currency in the given world.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithAccessTo(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, AccountPermission... permissions)
      Asynchronously retrieves a list of account IDs (UUIDs) that have the specified permissions for the given plugin name and account ID.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithMembershipTo(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID)
      Asynchronously retrieves a list of account UUIDs that have a membership associated with the specified plugin.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithOwnerOf(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID)
      Asynchronously retrieves a list of account IDs associated with a specific owner.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> addAccountMember(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Asynchronously adds a member to an account.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> addAccountMember(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid, AccountPermission... initialPermissions)
      Asynchronously adds a member to an account with the specified initial permissions.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID)
      Asynchronously retrieves the balance for the specified account associated with a given plugin.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world)
      Asynchronously retrieves the balance of a specific account within a given world for the specified plugin.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull String currency)
      Asynchronously retrieves the balance of a specified account for a given world and currency.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously checks if the specified amount can be deposited into the account associated with the given identifier.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously checks if a specified amount can be deposited into an account.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously checks if a specified amount can be deposited into a player's account for a given plugin, world, and currency.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Determines asynchronously if the specified amount can be withdrawn from the given account.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Checks asynchronously if a specified withdrawal operation can be performed for a given account.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously checks if a withdrawal operation can be performed on a specified account in the given world and currency for the specified amount.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> createAccount(@NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String name, boolean player)
      Asynchronously creates an account with the specified details.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> createAccount(@NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String name, @NotNull String worldName, boolean player)
      Asynchronously creates an account with the specified details.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> createSharedAccount(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String name, @NotNull UUID owner)
      Asynchronously creates a shared account in the specified plugin with the provided details.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> deleteAccount(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID)
      Asynchronously deletes an account identified by the specified plugin name and account ID.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously deposits a specified amount into the account identified by the given account ID.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously deposits a specified amount into an account within a defined world context for a given plugin.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously deposits the specified amount of currency into a given account.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Optional<String>> getAccountName(@NotNull UUID accountID)
      Asynchronously retrieves the account name associated with the given account ID.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Map<UUID,String>> getUUIDNameMap()
      Asynchronously retrieves a map where the keys are UUIDs and the values are corresponding names.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously checks if the specified plugin has the required attributes associated with the given account and amount.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull BigDecimal amount) 
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Checks asynchronously if a specific plugin has the required data or configuration for the given account, world, currency, and amount.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccount(@NotNull UUID accountID)
      Asynchronously checks whether an account exists for the specified account ID.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccount(@NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String worldName)
      Asynchronously checks if an account exists for the given account ID within the specified world.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccountPermission(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid, @NotNull AccountPermission permission)
      Asynchronously checks if the specified account has a given permission within the context of a specific plugin.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> isAccountMember(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Asynchronously checks whether the specified user is a member of the given account for the provided plugin.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> isAccountOwner(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Asynchronously checks whether the specified user is the owner of the given account for the specified plugin.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> removeAccountMember(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Removes a member from an account asynchronously.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> renameAccount(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String name)
      Renames an account asynchronously based on the provided plugin name, account ID, and new name.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> set(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Updates the balance of an account asynchronously.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> set(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Sets the specified amount asynchronously for the given account in the specified world.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> set(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously sets the balance for a specific account in the specified world and currency.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> setOwner(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Asynchronously sets the owner for a specific account associated with a plugin.
      CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID from, @NotNull UUID to, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously transfers a specified monetary amount from one user to another within the context of a given plugin.
      CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID from, @NotNull UUID to, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously transfers a specific amount of currency from one account to another within the same world.
      CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID from, @NotNull UUID to, @NotNull String worldName, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously transfers a specified amount of currency from one account to another within a specific world.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> updateAccountPermission(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull UUID uuid, @NotNull AccountPermission permission, boolean value)
      Updates the account permission for a specific account asynchronously.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously withdraws a specified amount of money from an account associated with the given UUID.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Initiates an asynchronous operation to withdraw a specified amount from an account in a specified world context.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull String pluginName, @NotNull UUID accountID, @NotNull String world, @NotNull String currency, @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
      Asynchronously withdraws a specified amount of currency from an account in a specific world.

    • Method Detail

      • createAccount

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> createAccount(@NotNull
                                                           @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                           @NotNull
                                                           @NotNull String name,
                                                           boolean player)
        Asynchronously creates an account with the specified details.
        Parameters:
        accountID - The unique identifier for the account. Must not be null.
        name - The name associated with the account. Must not be null.
        player - Indicates whether the account belongs to a player (true) or not (false).
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to a Boolean indicating the success of the account creation.

      • createAccount

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> createAccount(@NotNull
                                                           @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                           @NotNull
                                                           @NotNull String name,
                                                           @NotNull
                                                           @NotNull String worldName,
                                                           boolean player)
        Asynchronously creates an account with the specified details.
        Parameters:
        accountID - The unique identifier for the account. Must not be null.
        name - The name associated with the account. Must not be null.
        worldName - The name of the world associated with the account. Must not be null.
        player - Indicates whether the account is for a player (true) or not (false).
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the account creation was successful, or false otherwise.

      • getUUIDNameMap

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Map<UUID,String>> getUUIDNameMap()
        Asynchronously retrieves a map where the keys are UUIDs and the values are corresponding names.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that, when completed, provides a map of UUIDs to names.

      • getAccountName

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Optional<String>> getAccountName(@NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Asynchronously retrieves the account name associated with the given account ID.
        Parameters:
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account for which the name is being retrieved; must not be null.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing an Optional of the account name. If the account name is present, it will be wrapped in the Optional. Otherwise, the Optional will be empty.

      • hasAccount

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccount(@NotNull
                                                        @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Asynchronously checks whether an account exists for the specified account ID.
        Parameters:
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to check; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will complete with true if the account exists, false otherwise

      • hasAccount

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccount(@NotNull
                                                        @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                        @NotNull
                                                        @NotNull String worldName)
        Asynchronously checks if an account exists for the given account ID within the specified world.
        Parameters:
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to check; must not be null.
        worldName - the name of the world where the account is being verified; must not be null.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with true if the account exists, or false if it does not.

      • renameAccount

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> renameAccount(@NotNull
                                                           @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                           @NotNull
                                                           @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                           @NotNull
                                                           @NotNull String name)
        Renames an account asynchronously based on the provided plugin name, account ID, and new name.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin managing the account
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to be renamed
        name - the new name to assign to the account
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with a Boolean indicating whether the account was successfully renamed

      • deleteAccount

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> deleteAccount(@NotNull
                                                           @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                           @NotNull
                                                           @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Asynchronously deletes an account identified by the specified plugin name and account ID.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin associated with the account to be deleted, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to be deleted, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the account deletion is successful, or false otherwise

      • accountSupportsCurrency

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> accountSupportsCurrency(@NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull String currency)
        Asynchronously checks if the given account supports the specified currency within the context of the provided plugin.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin managing the account and currency; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to check; must not be null
        currency - the currency identifier to check for support; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the account supports the currency, or false otherwise

      • accountSupportsCurrency

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> accountSupportsCurrency(@NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull String currency,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull String world)
        Asynchronously checks if a specific account supports the provided currency in the given world.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the request; must not be null.
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to check; must not be null.
        currency - the currency to verify support for; must not be null.
        world - the world in which to check the currency support; must not be null.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will complete with a boolean indicating whether the account supports the specified currency in the specified world.

      • balance

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull
                                                        @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                        @NotNull
                                                        @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Asynchronously retrieves the balance for the specified account associated with a given plugin.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin for which the balance is requested; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing the balance as a BigDecimal; never null

      • balance

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull
                                                        @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                        @NotNull
                                                        @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                        @NotNull
                                                        @NotNull String world)
        Asynchronously retrieves the balance of a specific account within a given world for the specified plugin.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin managing the account balances, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to retrieve the balance for, must not be null
        world - the name of the world for which the account balance is being queried, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing the balance as a BigDecimal when the operation is completed

      • balance

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> balance(@NotNull
                                                        @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                        @NotNull
                                                        @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                        @NotNull
                                                        @NotNull String world,
                                                        @NotNull
                                                        @NotNull String currency)
        Asynchronously retrieves the balance of a specified account for a given world and currency.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the balance, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account, must not be null
        world - the name of the world for which the balance is being retrieved, must not be null
        currency - the currency for which the balance is being retrieved, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing the balance as a BigDecimal upon completion

      • has

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously checks if the specified plugin has the required attributes associated with the given account and amount.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin to be checked, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account, must not be null
        amount - the monetary value to be verified, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing a Boolean result indicating the outcome of the check

      • has

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String world,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull BigDecimal amount)

      • has

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(@NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String world,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String currency,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Checks asynchronously if a specific plugin has the required data or configuration for the given account, world, currency, and amount.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin to check
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account
        world - the world associated with the query
        currency - the currency type to check
        amount - the amount to verify
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to a boolean indicating the result of the check

      • set

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> set(@NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Updates the balance of an account asynchronously.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the operation, must not be null.
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to update, must not be null.
        amount - the new amount to set for the account's balance, must not be null.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that, when completed, will contain the result of the operation as an EconomyResponse.

      • set

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> set(@NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String world,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Sets the specified amount asynchronously for the given account in the specified world.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the request; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to modify; must not be null
        world - the name of the world where the account resides; must not be null
        amount - the amount to be set in the account; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with an EconomyResponse containing the result of the operation; never null

      • set

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> set(@NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String world,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull String currency,
                                                         @NotNull
                                                         @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously sets the balance for a specific account in the specified world and currency.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the balance update, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account whose balance is to be set, must not be null
        world - the name of the world in which the account balance is to be updated, must not be null
        currency - the currency in which the balance is to be set, must not be null
        amount - the amount to set for the account balance, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with the result of the balance update encapsulated in an EconomyResponse, never null

      • transfer

        CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull UUID from,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull UUID to,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously transfers a specified monetary amount from one user to another within the context of a given plugin. The method ensures atomicity by attempting to revert the withdrawal if the deposit fails.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the transfer; must not be null
        from - the unique identifier (UUID) of the user account from which the amount will be withdrawn; must not be null
        to - the unique identifier (UUID) of the user account to which the amount will be deposited; must not be null
        amount - the monetary amount to transfer; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing an MultiEconomyResponse detailing the status of the transfer, including the final balances, success/failure type, and error messages (if any)

      • transfer

        CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull UUID from,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull UUID to,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String worldName,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously transfers a specific amount of currency from one account to another within the same world. The transfer is performed as a withdrawal from the source account followed by a deposit into the target account. If the deposit operation fails, the withdrawn amount is refunded to the source account to ensure consistency.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - The name of the plugin initiating the transfer. Must not be null.
        from - The unique identifier of the sender's account. Must not be null.
        to - The unique identifier of the receiver's account. Must not be null.
        worldName - The name of the world in which the transfer is taking place. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount of currency to transfer. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture containing an MultiEconomyResponse containing the details of the transfer result, including the amount transferred, the resulting balances for both accounts, and the operation status. If the transfer fails, it contains error details.

      • transfer

        CompletableFuture<MultiEconomyResponse> transfer(@NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull UUID from,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull UUID to,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String worldName,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull String currency,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously transfers a specified amount of currency from one account to another within a specific world. The transfer involves withdrawing the amount from the source account and depositing it into the target account. If the deposit fails, the withdrawn amount is returned to the source account to ensure consistency.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the transfer
        from - the unique identifier (UUID) of the source account
        to - the unique identifier (UUID) of the target account
        worldName - the name of the world in which the transfer is taking place
        currency - the name of the currency being transferred
        amount - the amount of currency to transfer
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing an MultiEconomyResponse containing information about the result of the transfer, including success status, balances, and error messages if applicable

      • canWithdraw

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Determines asynchronously if the specified amount can be withdrawn from the given account.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the withdrawal check; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to check; must not be null
        amount - the amount to check for withdrawal eligibility; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that, when completed, provides an EconomyResponse indicating whether the withdrawal can proceed and additional information about the result

      • canWithdraw

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String world,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Checks asynchronously if a specified withdrawal operation can be performed for a given account.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the withdrawal check, must not be null.
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to check, must not be null.
        world - the name of the world context for the withdrawal operation, must not be null.
        amount - the amount to withdraw, must not be null.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing an EconomyResponse that indicates the outcome of the check.

      • canWithdraw

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canWithdraw(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String world,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String currency,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously checks if a withdrawal operation can be performed on a specified account in the given world and currency for the specified amount.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the withdrawal check; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to check; must not be null
        world - the name of the world where the account resides; must not be null
        currency - the currency in which the transaction is to be performed; must not be null
        amount - the amount to be checked for withdrawal; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to an EconomyResponse containing the result of the withdrawal check

      • withdraw

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull
                                                              @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously withdraws a specified amount of money from an account associated with the given UUID.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the withdrawal; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account from which the amount will be withdrawn; must not be null
        amount - the amount of money to withdraw; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will complete with an EconomyResponse indicating the result of the withdrawal operation, or an error if the operation fails

      • withdraw

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull
                                                              @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull String world,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Initiates an asynchronous operation to withdraw a specified amount from an account in a specified world context.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the withdrawal, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account from which the amount will be withdrawn, must not be null
        world - the name of the world in which the withdrawal is being performed, must not be null
        amount - the amount to withdraw from the account, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing the result of the withdrawal operation as an EconomyResponse

      • withdraw

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> withdraw(@NotNull
                                                              @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull String world,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull String currency,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously withdraws a specified amount of currency from an account in a specific world.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the transaction; cannot be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account from which the amount will be withdrawn; cannot be null
        world - the name of the world in which the transaction takes place; cannot be null
        currency - the currency to be withdrawn; cannot be null
        amount - the amount to be withdrawn from the account; cannot be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will complete with the result of the withdrawal operation

      • canDeposit

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull
                                                                @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously checks if the specified amount can be deposited into the account associated with the given identifier.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the operation; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account; must not be null
        amount - the amount to check for deposit feasibility; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to an EconomyResponse indicating whether the deposit is allowed or not

      • canDeposit

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull
                                                                @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull String world,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously checks if a specified amount can be deposited into an account.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - The name of the plugin initiating the check. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to check. Must not be null.
        world - The name of the world associated with the check. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to be deposited. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that, when completed, will contain an EconomyResponse indicating whether the deposit can be completed and additional response details.

      • canDeposit

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> canDeposit(@NotNull
                                                                @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull String world,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull String currency,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously checks if a specified amount can be deposited into a player's account for a given plugin, world, and currency.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - The name of the plugin requesting the deposit operation. Must not be null.
        accountID - The unique identifier of the account to check. Must not be null.
        world - The name of the world where the deposit is being checked. Must not be null.
        currency - The identifier of the currency for the deposit. Must not be null.
        amount - The amount to check for deposit eligibility. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture holding the result of the deposit eligibility check encapsulated in an EconomyResponse.

      • deposit

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously deposits a specified amount into the account identified by the given account ID.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the deposit; must not be null
        accountID - the UUID of the account where the deposit is to be made; must not be null
        amount - the amount to deposit into the account; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing an EconomyResponse that indicates the result of the deposit operation

      • deposit

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String world,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously deposits a specified amount into an account within a defined world context for a given plugin.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the deposit, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to deposit funds into, must not be null
        world - the name of the world where the deposit is occurring, must not be null
        amount - the amount of money to deposit, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to an EconomyResponse indicating the result of the deposit operation

      • deposit

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<EconomyResponse> deposit(@NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String world,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String currency,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull BigDecimal amount)
        Asynchronously deposits the specified amount of currency into a given account.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the deposit, must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to deposit into, must not be null
        world - the world in which the transaction is taking place, must not be null
        currency - the name of the currency being deposited, must not be null
        amount - the amount of currency to deposit, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to an EconomyResponse containing the result of the deposit operation

      • createSharedAccount

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> createSharedAccount(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String name,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID owner)
        Asynchronously creates a shared account in the specified plugin with the provided details.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin where the shared account will be created; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the shared account to be created; must not be null
        name - the name of the shared account; must not be null
        owner - the unique identifier of the owner of the shared account; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the shared account is successfully created, or false if the operation fails

      • accountsWithOwnerOf

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithOwnerOf(@NotNull
                                                                    @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                    @NotNull
                                                                    @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Asynchronously retrieves a list of account IDs associated with a specific owner.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - The name of the plugin for which the accounts are being queried. Must not be null.
        accountID - The UUID of the account owner whose associated account IDs are being retrieved. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that resolves to a list of UUIDs representing the account IDs associated with the specified owner.

      • accountsWithMembershipTo

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithMembershipTo(@NotNull
                                                                         @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                         @NotNull
                                                                         @NotNull UUID accountID)
        Asynchronously retrieves a list of account UUIDs that have a membership associated with the specified plugin.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin for which memberships are being queried; must not be null
        accountID - the UUID of the account for which memberships are being checked; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will complete with a list of UUIDs of accounts that have the specified membership

      • accountsWithAccessTo

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> accountsWithAccessTo(@NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     AccountPermission... permissions)
        Asynchronously retrieves a list of account IDs (UUIDs) that have the specified permissions for the given plugin name and account ID.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin for which access is being checked; must not be null
        accountID - the UUID of the account to check access for; must not be null
        permissions - the array of permissions being checked for the account; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to a list of UUIDs representing accounts with the specified permissions

      • isAccountOwner

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> isAccountOwner(@NotNull
                                                            @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull UUID uuid)
        Asynchronously checks whether the specified user is the owner of the given account for the specified plugin.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin to which the account belongs; must not be null.
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account being queried; must not be null.
        uuid - the unique identifier of the user being checked; must not be null.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to a Boolean indicating whether the user is the owner of the account.

      • setOwner

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> setOwner(@NotNull
                                                      @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                      @NotNull
                                                      @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                      @NotNull
                                                      @NotNull UUID uuid)
        Asynchronously sets the owner for a specific account associated with a plugin.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the ownership change. Must not be null.
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account for which the owner is being set. Must not be null.
        uuid - the unique identifier of the new owner. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the owner was successfully set, or false if the operation failed.

      • isAccountMember

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> isAccountMember(@NotNull
                                                             @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull UUID uuid)
        Asynchronously checks whether the specified user is a member of the given account for the provided plugin.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin associated with the account; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to check membership for; must not be null
        uuid - the unique identifier of the user to verify membership for; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the user is a member of the account, or false otherwise

      • addAccountMember

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> addAccountMember(@NotNull
                                                              @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull UUID uuid)
        Asynchronously adds a member to an account.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin invoking this operation
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to which the member will be added
        uuid - the unique identifier of the member to be added
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the operation is successful, otherwise false

      • addAccountMember

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> addAccountMember(@NotNull
                                                              @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull UUID uuid,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              AccountPermission... initialPermissions)
        Asynchronously adds a member to an account with the specified initial permissions.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the operation; must not be null
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account to which the member is being added; must not be null
        uuid - the unique identifier of the member being added; must not be null
        initialPermissions - the initial permissions granted to the member for the account; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the member was successfully added, or false otherwise

      • removeAccountMember

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> removeAccountMember(@NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                 @NotNull
                                                                 @NotNull UUID uuid)
        Removes a member from an account asynchronously.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin initiating the request. Must not be null.
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account. Must not be null.
        uuid - the unique identifier of the member to be removed. Must not be null.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the member was successfully removed, or false if the operation failed.

      • hasAccountPermission

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccountPermission(@NotNull
                                                                  @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                  @NotNull
                                                                  @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                  @NotNull
                                                                  @NotNull UUID uuid,
                                                                  @NotNull
                                                                  @NotNull AccountPermission permission)
        Asynchronously checks if the specified account has a given permission within the context of a specific plugin.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin to check the permission for; must not be null.
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account being checked; must not be null.
        uuid - the unique identifier of the user or entity performing the check; must not be null.
        permission - the specific account permission to validate; must not be null.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the account has the specified permission, or false otherwise.

      • updateAccountPermission

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> updateAccountPermission(@NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull String pluginName,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull UUID accountID,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull UUID uuid,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull AccountPermission permission,
                                                                     boolean value)
        Updates the account permission for a specific account asynchronously.
        Parameters:
        pluginName - the name of the plugin requesting the permission update
        accountID - the unique identifier of the account for which the permission needs to be updated
        uuid - the unique identifier representing the subject of the permission change
        permission - the specific permission to be updated for the account
        value - the value to set for the specified permission (true to grant, false to revoke)
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with a Boolean indicating the success or failure of the operation
